title: Viners Everyday Glisten 16 Piece 18/0 Silver Stainless Steel Cutlery Set (Packaging May Vary)
features: CLASSIC CUTLERY | This flatware cutlery set is guaranteed to make a bold statement at any dining table. The 16 piece set has a hammered textured effect embossed on the square edged handles to bring a uniquely stylish touch to your dining table.

16 PIECE SET | Add a touch of glamour to everyday dining or special occasions with the Everyday Glisten collection. This versatile set includes four dinner knives, four dinner forks, four tea spoons and four dessert spoons packaged in a beautiful gift box.

DURABILITY | Made from fine quality 18/0 steel, our cutlery is polished to a mirror finish. The long-lasting set is rust-resistant and can be used in the dishwasher. This once in a lifetime purchase is made to pass generation to generation.

EVERYDAY GLISTEN | The Everyday collection is enviably stylish with its modern textures or smooth designs. Find the one that suits your needs from any of our elegantly created cutlery sets in this range, from Fleur, Breeze, Glisten to Purity.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cookware made from the best materials.
description: From the manufacturer Fleur Cutlery Set Gift Box Sphere Cutlery Set Angel Cutlery Set Gift Box Twist Cutlery Set Gift Box Breeze Cutlery Gift Box Tabac Cutlery Set Gift Box Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.9 out of 5 stars 15 4.3 out of 5 stars 47 4.6 out of 5 stars 841 4.6 out of 5 stars 168 4.6 out of 5 stars 481 4.5 out of 5 stars 295 Price — no data — no data £38.99 £ 38 . 99 — no data £25.25 £ 25 . 25 £45.10 £ 45 . 10 Description With a striking textured pattern, Fleur will be sure to add a unique style to your dining experience. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel with a mirror finish. The Viners Sphere cutlery set features a beautiful simplistic design adding sophistication to any table. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel and each piece of cutlery is finished with a high mirror polish. A graceful arc sweeps across Angels contemporary handle forming a subtle curve. The rust-resistant Angel 24 piece cutlery set is made with quality 18/0 stainless steel with a mirror finish. Elegantly shaped handles designed to appear with a twist. Simple for everyday use but equally perfect in a formal setting. Mirror finish. The Viners Breeze cutlery set features a classic tear drop handle with a tapered ridge design, making it perfect for both traditional and modern place settings. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel with a high mirror finish. With a handle design that gently flows to form a classic teardrop shape, the Tabac cutlery set is made from quality 18/0 stainless steel with a high mirror polish.
